loop.hypothesis: People will adopt a planner that turns vague tasks into an approved daily schedule without requiring an account or subscription.
successMetrics: A new user creates and schedules a task in under 60 seconds
Every schedule mutation is previewed before Calendar or Reminders is changed
Core planning remains usable with AI unavailable
killCriteria: The deterministic planner cannot produce a useful schedule without excessive setup
Calendar and Reminders permissions create unacceptable onboarding abandonment
The first slice requires a hosted backend to be useful
